positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and ethereal fauna. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, designed for a clean, high-contrast apparel print. Dominant color palette: deep indigo, cyan, neon teal, and glowing lime green, contrasted against matte black and deep forest greens. Main subject: An interwoven pattern of stylized ancient roots, delicate glowing mushrooms, and geometric forest spirits. Style: Art Nouveau meets Modern Minimalism. Use strong silhouettes and glowing accents for visual pop. Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro with selective glowing highlights. Flat lay composition, vector art influence, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, lowres, worst quality, grainy, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, smudge, artifact, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, cropped, poorly drawn hands, jpeg artifacts, excessive detail, photo realistic, 3d render
